goal: Unblock exact-tab readiness checks for DeepSeek and Doubao through the legacy extension sidecars.
non_goals: Live prompt submission or reply capture
acceptance_criteria: DeepSeek can activate and resolve an insert-capable legacy adapter through public registry APIs.
Doubao probe and content-script failure paths complete within a fixed bound.
Only secret-free runtime diagnostics cross the extension relay.
Focused and full local test suites pass.
